path.id: A robust, automated workflow orchestrating seamless inventory synchronization across Shopify, Amazon, and legacy ERP systems, eliminating overselling and manual data entry.
Manual inventory updates across 3 disjointed platforms causing significant overselling events, frustrated customers, and wasted operational hours.
A custom Make (Integromat) workflow providing near real-time syncing between Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, and the central ERP.

g.id: Technical dashboard showing data flows and sync status
